title: Spanish Paella with Pumpkin and Sausage
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make paella dish with the addition of roasted pumpkin. Perfect for a fall evening.

ingredients.name: Spanish chorizo
ingredients.notes: look for Spanish chorizo at your local grocery store or substitute with regular chorizo

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the chorizo from the pan and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cubed pumpkin and cook until tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the diced tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the paella rice, saffron threads, and light soy sauce. Stir to combine.
Return the cooked chorizo to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the pan to the oven and cook at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
